meta.content: Sawon - Digital Marketer & Graphic Designer from Bangladesh. Expert in SEO, Guest Posting, Facebook Ads, Logo Design, Branding & Social Media Marketing.
meta.name: description

meta.content: Digital Marketer, Graphic Designer, SEO Expert, Facebook Ads, Logo Design, Branding, Bangladesh, Freelancer
meta.name: keywords

meta.content: Professional Digital Marketer & Graphic Designer. Expert in SEO, Facebook Ads, Logo Design & Branding.

div.h1:
Helping Brands Grow with
Creative Digital
Marketing
div.p: Professional Digital Marketer & Graphic Designer from Bangladesh. I'm
Add Your Photo Replace this block with an tag pointing to your hosted photo URL
Your About Photo

Hi, I'm Sawon — a passionate Digital Marketer and Graphic Designer based in Barishal, Bangladesh. With over 4 years of hands-on experience, I help businesses and brands build a powerful digital presence that drives real results.

I combine creative design thinking with data-driven marketing strategies to deliver solutions that not only look stunning but also convert visitors into loyal customers. My work spans across SEO, paid advertising, branding, and content — all crafted to elevate your brand.
Comprehensive digital solutions designed to elevate your brand and accelerate your business growth.

div.div: Build powerful authority with high-quality backlinks and strategic guest posting campaigns on DR 50+ websites to dominate search rankings.
ROI-driven Facebook & Instagram ad campaigns with precise targeting, compelling creatives, and conversion-optimized funnels.
Professional visual design for social media, marketing materials, flyers, banners, and digital assets that capture attention and drive engagement.
Iconic logo design and complete brand identity packages including typography, color systems, brand guidelines, and visual language.
SEO-optimized, compelling content for blogs, websites, product descriptions, social media, and email campaigns that engage and convert.
Full-service social media management, strategy, content creation, and community building to grow your brand presence organically and paid.

div.p: A curated showcase of branding, design, SEO, and digital marketing projects.
Connect with me on top freelance platforms and professional networks.
Years of dedicated practice across design and digital marketing disciplines.

I bring a rare combination of left-brain strategy and right-brain creativity. Whether it's architecting an SEO campaign or designing a pixel-perfect brand identity, I approach every project with precision and passion.
My toolkit spans from Adobe Creative Suite and industry SEO platforms to Facebook Business Manager and advanced analytics dashboards.
Real feedback from real clients across Fiverr, Upwork, and direct engagements.

Sawon delivered an exceptional brand identity package for our startup. The logo and visual system exceeded all expectations. Professional, creative, and delivered ahead of schedule. Highly recommended!
The Facebook ad campaign Sawon created for us generated a 6x ROAS in the first month. Incredible targeting strategy and creative assets. Will definitely hire again for our next campaign.
Amazing SEO work! Sawon built 50+ high-quality backlinks that boosted our domain authority significantly. Our organic traffic tripled within 3 months. Excellent communication throughout.
Sawon's content writing is top-notch. Every piece was well-researched, SEO-optimized, and written in a compelling voice. Our blog engagement increased by 180% after working with him.
Insights, tutorials, and strategies on digital marketing, SEO, and graphic design.

div.div: Top 10 SEO Link Building Strategies That Actually Work in 2025
Discover the most effective white-hat link building techniques to boost your domain authority and organic rankings.
How to Create Facebook Ads That Convert: A Complete Guide
Master the art of Facebook advertising with audience targeting, creative best practices and budget optimization.
Logo Design Principles Every Brand Owner Needs to Know
Understanding the fundamentals of logo design that make brands instantly recognizable and memorable worldwide.

div.p: Ready to elevate your brand? Reach out and let's discuss your project.

textarea.placeholder: Tell me about your project, goals, and timeline...

div.p: Thank you! I'll get back to you within 2-4 hours.
Digital Marketer & Graphic Designer from Bangladesh, helping global brands grow with creative strategy and stunning design.
